title: Creamy Citrusy Japanese Cherry Tomatoes Gyoza
description: A kid-friendly Japanese dish featuring cherry tomatoes, creamy sauce, and crispy gyoza wrappers, inspired by Okinawan flavors.
instructions: Wrap gyoza wrappers around cherry tomatoes and set aside.
Heat a pan over medium heat and add grated ginger and garlic. Cook for 1 minute.
Add soy sauce, rice vinegar, and honey to the pan and stir to combine. Cook for 1 minute.
Add mayonnaise and stir to combine. Cook for 1 minute.
Add sous-vide egg substitute and stir to combine. Cook for 1 minute.
Add green onions and stir to combine. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the wrapped cherry tomatoes to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the gyoza wrappers are crispy and golden brown.
Serve the gyoza hot with a side of your favorite dipping sauce.
